---
title: "Data, Code and Visualization"
subtitle: "A list of sketches, ideas and notes"
listing:
  id: listings
  feed:
    type: partial
    items: 20
    title: "Data, Code and Visualization"
    description: "Notes and experiments about data, statistics, R, code, and visualization."
  contents: posts
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, reading-time]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 250px
  page-size: 18
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
code-tools: false
---

::: {#listings}
:::
